title: Gold Breaks Below $4,000 as Multi-Year Rally Grinds to a Halt
summary: Gold fell below $4,000 an ounce for the first time since November, as the prospect of higher interest rates and a resurgent dollar bring bullion’s three-year bull market to a halt.
